heading: The work moves itself.
sub: Not a sales pitch — just an ordinary day. What's said reaches what's kept on its own, and your people are free for the work that actually grows the business.

steps.said: Shipped the Henderson order — invoice to follow.
steps.caption: The morning's first order is in the books before anyone's had coffee. No one re-typed a thing.

steps.said: Heads-up — the Lagos container slipped two days.
steps.caption: A delay that used to surface as a penalty now surfaces as a heads-up — drafted and waiting for a yes.

steps.said: Customer wants Thursday's delivery moved to Monday.
steps.caption: Dispatch, the crew, and the office all work from one plan. The change lands everywhere at once.
The day reconciles itself. Every line that was said today is in the books tonight.
